description: A player who was banned for toxic behavior submits an appeal, claiming they have reformed.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the player's account details, the original ban reason, and their chat logs.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accesses all historical data related to the ban.

nodes.task_description: Review the player's appeal and their past behavior.

expected_outcome.value: Agent reviews the case and notes the player has had multiple previous suspensions.

nodes.task_description: Based on the history of repeat offenses, deny the appeal and uphold the ban.

expected_outcome.value: Agent denies the appeal and sends a notification to the player explaining the decision.
